page_title: OMANI SPECIAL THOBE | One Ummah BD
page_description:
Fabric Specification:


	Fabric Type: Premium Blended Fabric
	GSM: 130 (Lightweight & breathable)
	Weave: Smooth Plain / Soft Finish


Dye Type: Reactive Dye – for long-lasting, fade-resistant color


What Makes It Unique?

Engineered from a balanced blend of natural and synthetic fibers

Offers the softness of cotton, with the durability and wrinkle-resistance of polyester or viscose
